description_long: This is a modern laptop with a metallic silver finish, featuring a large display and a full-sized keyboard. The screen is open and displays a 3D modeling software interface, suggesting it is used for design or technical work. The keyboard includes a touchpad and a fingerprint sensor, and the palm rest area has a couple of stickers, one of which appears to be a square with a blue border. The lid of the laptop is adorned with two large graphic stickers—one circular and one with an alien face and the word 'BEAST'—as well as a central HP logo and a rectangular sticker at the bottom. The sides of the laptop show ventilation grills and several ports, indicating good connectivity. The overall build appears sturdy and professional, suitable for urban environments like cafes, co-working spaces, or outdoor benches.
description: A silver HP laptop with a large screen displaying 3D modeling software, decorated with graphic stickers on the lid and several visible ports and ventilation grills.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with 3D modeling software, full keyboard, touchpad, and palm rest stickers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile, ventilation grills, and some visible ports.
description_view_2: Rear view of the closed lid, displaying two large graphic stickers, the HP logo, and a rectangular sticker at the bottom.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the keyboard, touchpad, and additional ports and ventilation grills.
attribute_brand_logo: HP logo centered on the back of the lid, stylized as a minimalist 'hp' in silver.
attribute_screen_state: Screen is open and turned on, displaying a 3D modeling software interface.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row, standard keys, and a visible touchpad; no numeric keypad.
attribute_sticker_placement: Two large graphic stickers on the back lid (one circular, one with an alien face and 'BEAST'), and a rectangular sticker at the bottom of the lid; a small square sticker on the right palm rest.
